title: Australia's biodiversity report card omits fossil fuel support - ABC News

title: Australia's biodiversity report card omits fossil fuel support
description: A target to identify financial support of fossil fuel industries harmful to the environment was unmet in Australia's self-assessment on its progress to meeting international biodiversity commitments.

title: Incredible 2,000-year-old ancient city British tourists are warned not to visit
description: The city is one of the most famous archaeological sites in the world and attracts visitors from across the globe.

title: Cornell and Technion scientists adapt ancient clay air conditioning tech for sustainable cooling
description: In innovative study that precedes Cornell students' push to sever ties with Israeli institution, researchers use traditional ceramic know-how for off-grid chill through evaporationThe post Cornell and Technion scientists adapt ancient clay air conditioning tech for sustainable cooling appeared first on The Times of Israel.

title: Kanaka Durga temple officials plan restoration of ancient Pasupateswara temple on Indrakeeladri
description: Temple authorities inspect dilapidated shrine associated with the legend of Arjuna obtaining Pasupatastra from Lord Siva and submit proposal to the government for restoration and improvement of access path
